description: An introduction to the breadth and practice of Geography. Introduces geographic perspectives, theories, themes, and research design. Covers the history of the discipline, applied quantitative and qualitative methodologies used in geographic research, and a selection of subfields within the discipline.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Geography or Cartography and Geographic Information Systems undergraduate programs

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Geography or Cartography and Geographic Information Systems undergraduate programs
